sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111918" key="foibhla/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοιβηλάλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111918.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uttering the oracles of Phoebus,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρίπους, μάντις,</foreign> Ps. Callisth.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.45</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Φοιβηλάλος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Πυθία</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
